stops.name: teamLab Planets TOKYO
stops.notes: An immersive digital art museum fitting the 'culture' vibe. It's fully indoors, making it an excellent choice for cold December weather. | Tags: Museums, Attractions | ⭐ 4.3/5 (5,130 reviews)

stops.name: Waho-An Nature Tokyo
stops.notes: An indoor spa and wellness experience, offering relaxation and a cultural aspect (Japanese wellness). It's perfect for escaping the cold weather. | Tags: Spas & Wellness, Activities | ⭐ 5.0/5 (1,135 reviews)

stops.name: Tokyo Central Railway Station
stops.notes: More than just a station, it's an iconic historic landmark with impressive architecture, numerous food options (including vegetarian-friendly choices), and shopping (e.g., Character Street for anime fans). It's mostly indoors, perfect for cold weather and aligns with culture, food, and anime interests. | Tags: Sights & Landmarks, Attractions | ⭐ 4.2/5 (4,323 reviews)

stops.name: Tokyo Skytree
stops.notes: An iconic landmark offering panoramic city views from indoor observation decks. It's a good cultural experience and suitable for cold weather. | Tags: Sights & Landmarks, Attractions | ⭐ 4.2/5 (8,158 reviews)

stops.name: Tokyo Localized - Free Walking Tour in Tokyo & More
stops.address: Meeting Place: AKB48 Cafe, Chiyoda 110-0006 Tokyo Prefecture
stops.notes: While great for culture, as a walking tour, it's heavily exposed to cold December weather, potentially including snow, which would significantly diminish the experience. | Tags: Tours, Activities | ⭐ 4.9/5 (4,520 reviews)
